allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'Count returned: {len\(d\) if isinstance\(d,list\) else len\(d.get\(\\"data\\",[]\)\)}'\)")

Bash(python -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('/tmp/prods.json'\)\); rows = d if isinstance\(d,list\) else d.get\('data',[]\); print\('count=', len\(rows\)\); hits=[p for p in rows if '2026030827650' in str\(p.get\('barcode',''\)\) or '2026030827650' in str\(p.get\('barcodes',''\)\)]; print\('scan hit?', len\(hits\), hits[0].get\('name'\) if hits else None\)")
